statistics.title: Our Achievements
statistics.subtitle: Numbers that speak for our excellence

q1.question: How do I book an appointment?
q1.answer: You can book an appointment through our website, mobile app, or by calling our hotline. Simply choose your preferred doctor, select an available time slot, and confirm your booking.

q2.question: What insurance plans do you accept?
q2.answer: We accept most major insurance plans. Please contact our billing department or check with your insurance provider to confirm coverage before your visit.

q3.question: What are your visiting hours?
q3.answer: Our regular visiting hours are from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM daily. Emergency services are available 24/7.

q4.question: Do you offer telemedicine consultations?
q4.answer: Yes, we offer online consultations for selected specialties. You can schedule a video consultation through our platform.

q5.question: How can I access my medical records?
q5.answer: You can access your medical records through your patient portal account. Simply log in with your credentials to view your complete medical history.
